projectsDetailed.title: E-commerce website
projectsDetailed.shortDescription: A modern e-commerce website clone built to simulate a real online shopping experience. It includes product listings, search, category filters, product details, cart functionality, and a responsive design for mobile and desktop users
projectsDetailed.longDescription:
This e-commerce website clone is a full-featured project designed to replicate the experience of a real online store. The website allows users to browse products through categories, search for specific items, and view detailed product pages with images, pricing, and descriptions. Users can add products to the cart, update quantities, and review their order before checkout.
The project is fully responsive, ensuring a smooth experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. It focuses on clean UI/UX, fast loading speed, and modern design principles. The website was built to strengthen skills in frontend and backend development, including handling dynamic product data, user interactions, and responsive layouts.
Key features include:
Product listing and filtering
Search functionality
Product detail pages
Add to cart and cart management
Responsive design
Modern and clean interface
Optimized performance and user experience
This project showcases practical full-stack development skills and demonstrates the ability to build a real-world business website similar to major e-commerce platforms.

projectsDetailed.title: Vainsh
projectsDetailed.shortDescription: A secure end-to-end encrypted chatting web app built for private real-time communication. It allows users to send messages instantly while keeping conversations protected so only the sender and receiver can read them.
projectsDetailed.longDescription:
This end-to-end encrypted chatting web app is designed for users who want fast, private, and temporary communication. All messages are encrypted before being sent, meaning only the sender and receiver can read them. In addition to strong encryption, the app includes an automatic chat deletion system that permanently removes messages after a selected time period.
The platform supports real-time one-to-one messaging with a clean and responsive interface. Users can choose temporary conversations where messages disappear automatically after being viewed or after a countdown ends. This creates a secure and private communication experience similar to disappearing-message platforms.
Key features include:
End-to-end encrypted messaging
Automatic chat and message deletion
Self-destruct timer for conversations
Real-time private messaging
Secure user authentication
Responsive design for desktop and mobile
Privacy-focused user experience

projectsDetailed.title: Sithub Bootstrap
projectsDetailed.shortDescription: A responsive clone of the Sithub Bootstrap website built using HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap. It recreates the original layout with modern styling, smooth sections, and a mobile-friendly design.
projectsDetailed.longDescription:
This project is a complete front-end clone of the Sithub Bootstrap website, developed to strengthen my skills in HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap. The website includes a fully responsive layout that adapts smoothly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. It features a clean navigation bar, hero section, content cards, responsive grids, and modern UI elements inspired by the original design.
The project was built with a focus on pixel-perfect design, proper spacing, reusable Bootstrap components, and optimized responsiveness. Through this clone, I practiced building structured layouts, customizing Bootstrap classes, improving mobile compatibility, and creating a professional-looking website that can be used as part of my portfolio.

projectsDetailed.title: News Blog Website
projectsDetailed.shortDescription: A modern news blog website that displays the latest articles, trending topics, and category-based news in a clean and responsive layout
projectsDetailed.longDescription: This project is a fully responsive news blog website built to showcase news articles in an organized and attractive way. It includes category-based filtering, featured articles, recent posts, search functionality, and a clean reading experience for users on both mobile and desktop. The website is designed with a modern UI, fast loading speed, and SEO-friendly structure to improve visibility and engagement. It can be used for technology news, world news, business updates, sports, entertainment, or any custom blog niche.
